---
title: "Highlights"
output: word_document
---

- MADYMO HIC15 scores predict head injury risk in frontal crashes with an AUC of 0.7.

- Crash speed, BMI, and time of day significantly influence the relationship.

- HIC15 alone predicts head injury risk, unaffected by crash characteristics.

- Future research should develop MADYMO models with scalable height and weight.

- This study validates MADYMO HIC15 for predicting head injury risk in frontal crashes.
